command:
echo '=== FIND DELEGATOR ON VM-CLAUDE-HUB ==='
find /home/jose/.local -name 'moreno*' 2>/dev/null
find /home/jose/.config -name 'moreno*' 2>/dev/null | head -10
ls /home/jose/.local/bin/ 2>/dev/null | grep moreno

echo '=== DELEGATOR HELP ==='
/home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-delegate --help 2>&1 | head -50

echo '=== CONFIG ==='
cat /home/jose/.config/moreno-unified-delegator/config.json 2>/dev/null

echo DONE_1871
